question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

assessment.note: Skipped answer provides no signal for clarity or engagement.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Underlying lateness causes
new_queue.name: What factors are contributing to your late arrivals?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Current energy drivers
new_queue.name: What’s currently giving you energy in your work, and what's draining it?

new_queue.label: Support from manager
new_queue.name: What support would make the biggest difference for you right now?

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What growth opportunities are you seeing for yourself right now?

new_queue.label: Energy routine impact
new_queue.name: How does your daily routine impact your energy levels?
